description: Introvoke (also branded in its docs as Sequel) provides video event, webinar, networking, and engagement tooling for companies. Its platform includes APIs for managing companies, events, networking hubs, customization themes, usage data, and webinar transcript access.
summary: Introvoke exposes a bearer-JWT-authenticated REST API at `https://api.introvoke.com/api/v1` plus a bearer-JWT-authenticated MCP server at `https://api.introvoke.com/api/mcp`.
